emails.subject: RE: New counterparty request form (deal 901255)
emails.body: RE: New counterparty request form (deal 901255) Stacy, Susan called and asked that I prepare an assignment letter. I will do so. Could you send me a copy of the contract we are assigning and a copy of the assignment in interest letter. Thanks.

emails.subject: RE: New counterparty request form (deal 901255)
emails.body: Yes, I'll get those out to you today. Please let me know if there's anything I can do to help. I'll let Elizabeth Hernandez and Kevin Brady know they've been calling almost every day asking the status. Thanks, SBR x30569

emails.subject: RE: New counterparty request form (deal 901255)
emails.body: OK, I gave up. I've been in meetings all day anyhow, so I just stuck the copies in interoffice mail.
